examples.title: GitHub Actions Pipeline for Python FastAPI
examples.description: Design CI/CD pipeline for a Python FastAPI application with testing, linting, and deployment.

input.context: Python FastAPI app, pytest for tests, deployed to GCP Cloud Run. Needs lint, test, build, deploy stages. Branch protection on main.

expected_output.stage_table:
| Stage | Trigger | Steps | Timeout | Failure |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Lint | push to any | ruff check, mypy | 5m | stop [GEN] |
| Test | push to any | pytest --cov | 10m | stop [GEN] |
| Build | push to main | docker build, push to GAR | 10m | stop [GEN] |
| Deploy | push to main (after build) | gcloud run deploy | 5m | rollback [GEN] |

examples.title: Terraform GCP Module with Cost Estimate
examples.description: Create Terraform module for GCP Cloud Run service with VPC connector.

input.context: Deploy FastAPI container to Cloud Run. Needs VPC connector for private DB access. Minimum 1 instance, max 10. Custom domain.

expected_output.resource_table:
| Resource | Type | Dependencies | Est. Monthly Cost |
|---|---|---|---|
| Cloud Run Service | google_cloud_run_v2_service | VPC Connector | ~$30 [SPEC] |
| VPC Connector | google_vpc_access_connector | VPC | ~$7 [SPEC] |
| Custom Domain | google_cloud_run_domain_mapping | Cloud Run | $0 [GEN] |

examples.title: Incident Triage (Low Energy)
examples.description: Triage a Cloud Run service returning 503 errors.

input.context: Cloud Run service 'agents-api' returning 503 since 02:15 UTC. Container logs show OOM kills. Current memory: 512MB. Traffic spike from 100 to 2000 rps.

expected_output.triage_table:
| Hypothesis | Evidence | Confidence | Tag |
|---|---|---|---|
| OOM from traffic spike | OOM kills + 20x traffic increase | 0.9 | [DRV] |
| Memory leak | OOM kills | 0.3 | [SPEC] |
expected_output.quick_fix: Increase memory to 1Gi, set max-instances to 20. [GEN]
expected_output.energy_note: Low energy: triage table + quick fix. No deep profiling. Escalate if OOM persists after memory increase.
